name: Golf Miami 305
about: Golf Miami 305 is an indoor golf simulator facility located in Miami Gardens, Florida. They utilize Trackman 4 technology to provide a realistic and accurate virtual golf experience, allowing users to play on famous courses and receive real-time swing data. The venue offers a variety of services including individual bay rentals, multi-zone experiences, golf lessons, and event hosting. It is designed to be accessible for new golfers and community members, with a mission to introduce the game of golf to everyday people.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman 4 technology for the most accurate and realistic indoor golf experience
Comprehensive 3-Zone experience combining Trackman simulator, putting area, and outdoor activities
Family-friendly atmosphere with programs for all ages, including youth camps and lessons

food_and_drink.notes: Gourmet sandwiches and salads available from the in-house deli.
BYOB policy not explicitly stated. Focus is on premium lounge atmosphere with dedicated hostess.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing real-time swing and shot data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulator and practice areas.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers an in-house deli with sandwiches and salads. Their alcohol policy is not explicitly stated, so it is recommended to inquire directly about bringing outside beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulated golf round is available. While a specific time is not listed, a standard 9-hole round is typically around 1-2 hours, suggesting an 18-hole experience would take 2-4 hours.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Miami 305 is kid-friendly and offers programs specifically for youth, including a weekend youth golf camp, golf lessons for ages 7-17, and youth day parties.
